name: Newspaper example for the state of AI tool in 2026
description: Research the current state of AI coding tools, synthesise findings, write an article, fact-check it, and produce a polished final draft.

agents.description: Researches AI coding tool landscape (Copilot, Cursor, etc.)
Researches agentic coding patterns and multi-agent dev workflows
Researches enterprise adoption patterns, ROI, and risks
Fan-in: synthesises all three research streams into a unified briefing
agents.name: 004_synthesizer

agents.description: Writes a 600-word article from the synthesised briefing
Independently fact-checks the synthesised briefing for accuracy
agents.name: 006_fact_checker

agents.description: Fan-in: merges the draft article with fact-check notes into a final polished piece
agents.name: 007_editor
